overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt swimming across a wide river in a sunny, mountainous region, then emerging onto a sandy shore and walking along the waterfront. The scene features lush green vegetation, distant windmills, and a prominent snow-capped mountain in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide river crossing with tree-lined banks

agents.ego_description: Geralt swimming steadily across the river toward the opposite bank, creating ripples in the water

entered.detail: calm blue river surface with gentle ripples and reflections
dense green deciduous trees lining the left riverbank
lush green vegetation and trees on the right riverbank
hazy blue mountain range visible on the horizon
sandy beach destination on the far bank becoming progressively closer

segments.scene_description: Geralt swims through calm river waters surrounded by lush green banks. Trees line both sides of the river while distant mountains rise on the horizon. The camera follows from behind as the character makes steady progress toward the sandy shore ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank with windmills and snow-capped mountain vista

events.description: Geralt stands up in shallow water and transitions from swimming to walking onto the sandy shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the sandy riverbank with water to his right, heading toward the distant windmills and mountain

entered.detail: traditional wooden windmills visible on the distant hillside across the river
large majestic snow-covered mountain peak dominating the background

segments.scene_description: Having reached the shore, Geralt emerges from the water and walks along the sandy beach. The river remains visible to the right while windmills and a majestic snow-capped mountain dominate the distant landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a swim through a calm river to a walk along a sunlit sandy shore. It begins behind Geralt as he swims through clear waters, flanked by lush green banks and distant mountains on the horizon. As he reaches the edge of the river, the camera follows him emerging from the water and transitioning onto the sandy beach. The scene then expands to reveal the river trailing off to the right while windmills and a majestic snow-capped mountain dominate the landscape ahead.
